title: 新能源
subtitle: New Energy, Alternative Energy, Clean Power
assistant_message: Learn to discuss new energy sources, alternative energy technologies, and the transition to clean power.

examples.chinese: 为了应对气候变化，各国都在大力发展新能源。
examples.translation: In order to address climate change, countries are vigorously developing new energy.
examples.translation_id: Untuk mengatasi perubahan iklim, negara-negara sedang giat mengembangkan energi baru.

examples.chinese: 新能源不仅环保，而且资源丰富，取之不尽。
examples.translation: New energy is not only environmentally friendly but also abundant and inexhaustible.
examples.translation_id: Energi baru tidak hanya ramah lingkungan tetapi juga berlimpah dan tidak ada habisnya.

examples.chinese: 随着新能源技术的成熟，成本正在下降。
examples.translation: Along with the maturation of new energy technology, costs are falling.
examples.translation_id: Seiring dengan matangnya teknologi energi baru, biaya sedang turun.

dialogue.speaker: male
dialogue.name: Fan Zhe
dialogue.chinese: 为了应对气候变化，各国都在大力发展新能源。你觉得哪种新能源最有前景？
dialogue.pinyin: Wèile yìngduì qìhòu biànhuà, gèguó dōu zài dàlì fāzhǎn xīn néngyuán. Nǐ juéde nǎ zhǒng xīn néngyuán zuì yǒu qiánjǐng?
dialogue.translation: In order to address climate change, countries are vigorously developing new energy. Which new energy source do you think has the most promise?
dialogue.translation_id: Untuk mengatasi perubahan iklim, negara-negara sedang giat mengembangkan energi baru. Sumber energi baru mana yang menurut Anda paling menjanjikan?

dialogue.speaker: female
dialogue.name: Tian Yuan
dialogue.chinese: 新能源不仅环保，而且资源丰富。太阳能和风能目前发展最快，但氢能也很有潜力。
dialogue.pinyin: Xīn néngyuán bùjǐn huánbǎo, érqiě zīyuán fēngfù. Tàiyáng néng hé fēng néng mùqián fāzhǎn zuì kuài, dàn qīng néng yě hěn yǒu qiánlì.
dialogue.translation: New energy is not only environmentally friendly but also abundant. Solar and wind energy are developing fastest currently, but hydrogen energy also has great potential.
dialogue.translation_id: Energi baru tidak hanya ramah lingkungan tetapi juga berlimpah. Energi surya dan angin berkembang paling cepat saat ini, tetapi energi hidrogen juga memiliki potensi besar.

dialogue.speaker: male
dialogue.name: Fan Zhe
dialogue.chinese: 新能源发展面临哪些障碍？
dialogue.pinyin: Xīn néngyuán fāzhǎn miànlín nǎxiē zhàng'ài?
dialogue.translation: What obstacles does new energy development face?
dialogue.translation_id: Hambatan apa yang dihadapi oleh pengembangan energi baru?

dialogue.speaker: female
dialogue.name: Tian Yuan
dialogue.chinese: 随着新能源技术的成熟，成本正在下降。但能源储存和电网接入仍是挑战。
dialogue.pinyin: Suízhe xīn néngyuán jìshù de chéngshú, chéngběn zhèngzài xiàjiàng. Dàn néngyuán chǔcún hé diànwǎng jiērù réng shì tiǎozhàn.
dialogue.translation: Along with the maturation of new energy technology, costs are falling. But energy storage and grid integration remain challenges.
dialogue.translation_id: Seiring dengan matangnya teknologi energi baru, biaya sedang turun. Namun penyimpanan energi dan integrasi jaringan tetap menjadi tantangan.

exercises.question: What does 新能源 (xīn néngyuán) mean?
How to say 'hydrogen energy' in Chinese?
Complete: 新能源不仅环保，______资源丰富。
